t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key. 0=Not available (fallback/placeholder for users whose country cannot be determined), 1-250=countries ordered roughly alphabetically by ISO code. Referenced by Dim_Customer, Fact_BillingDeposit, Dim_CountryBin, V_Dim_Customer. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Country upstream wiki)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: DWH country dimension key. FK to DWH_dbo.Dim_Country.CountryID. HASH distribution key. For US (CountryID=219), one row per state. (Tier 2 — SP_EXW_WalletElligibleCountries)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Entire Tier 1 upstream description dropped. Sentinel value 0, range 1-250, referenced-by list all lost. Wrong tier (Tier 2 instead of Tier 1).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full country name in English. Unique per row. Used in UI dropdowns, compliance documents, and analytical reports. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Country upstream wiki)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Country name from DWH_dbo.Dim_Country.Name. Text label for the country whose payment eligibility is represented. (Tier 2 — SP_EXW_WalletElligibleCountries)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Upstream description replaced with generic paraphrase. 'Unique per row' and usage context dropped. Wrong tier (Tier 2 instead of Tier 1).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Full human-readable geographic name of the region — state, province, or territory. Sourced from Dictionary.RegionName.Name. Examples: "California", "New York", "Ontario". Used in reporting to display readable geographic labels. (Tier 2 — SP_Dictionaries_DL_To_Synapse)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: US state name from DWH_dbo.Dim_State_and_Province.Name for US rows; NULL for other countries. (Tier 3 — inferred)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Examples dropped, production source (Dictionary.RegionName) lost, narrowed from 'state, province, or territory' to 'US state'. Wrong tier (Tier 3 instead of Tier 1).

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary join key. Auto-incrementing surrogate PK from Dictionary.RegionByIP (IDENTITY NOT FOR REPLICATION). Stored in Customer.CustomerStatic.RegionByIP_ID and used to identify the sub-country region detected from a customer's IP address at registration. (Tier 1 — upstream wiki, Dictionary.RegionByIP)
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Geographic region identifier from Dim_State_and_Province.RegionByIP_ID for US states; NULL for non-US countries. (Tier 3 — inferred)
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Entire upstream description dropped: identity semantics, customer usage context, Dictionary.RegionByIP origin. Wrong tier (Tier 3 instead of Tier 1).

issues.column_or_section: Country, Crypto, AllowedUserResource, AllowedUserTagType, AllowedUserTagValue, AllowedUserSelectedValue, CryptosResourceName, CryptosTagType, CryptosTagValue, CryptosSelectedValue, StateProvince
issues.problem: 11 of 16 columns have fabricated data types. DDL says Country is varchar(50), wiki says nvarchar(100). DDL says Crypto is nvarchar(256), wiki says nvarchar(100). All 8 Settings-derived columns have inflated lengths (e.g., DDL nvarchar(50) → wiki nvarchar(100) or nvarchar(200)). StateProvince is varchar(100) in DDL but nvarchar(100) in wiki.

All four dim-lookup passthrough columns are mis-tiered. CountryID and Country should be Tier 1 (Dictionary.Country, via Dim_Country wiki). StateProvince and RegionByIP_ID should be Tier 1 (via Dim_State_and_Province wiki). Writer tagged them Tier 2 and Tier 3 respectively.

Bundle claimed no upstream wikis were resolvable, but DWH_dbo.Dim_Country.md and DWH_dbo.Dim_State_and_Province.md both exist in the repo. This caused 0 Tier 1 columns where there should be at least 4.

SP change history (2026-04-14) explicitly removes payment, staking, and conversion sections. Table is orphaned — will never be refreshed again. Wiki says 'Full refresh (TRUNCATE + INSERT)' which is now false. Should say 'Orphaned — SP payment section removed 2026-04-14'.

Crypto source identified only as 'crypto lookup dimension' and 'Crypto dimension (no upstream wiki)'. Actual source is EXW_Wallet.CryptoTypes (SP lines 995-999). Writer failed to trace the source table.
Missing Section 5.2 ETL pipeline ASCII diagram. Missing row count and date range in Section 1. Missing inline key=value for PaymentAllowed {0=not allowed, 1=allowed}.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Fix all 11 data type mismatches — read DDL exactly: Country varchar(50), Crypto nvarchar(256), AllowedUserResource nvarchar(100), AllowedUserTagType nvarchar(50), etc. (2) Re-tag CountryID and Country as Tier 1 (Dictionary.Country) using verbatim descriptions from Dim_Country wiki. (3) Re-tag StateProvince and RegionByIP_ID as Tier 1 using verbatim descriptions from Dim_State_and_Province wiki. (4) Update Refresh to note SP payment section removed 2026-04-14 — table is orphaned. (5) Name crypto source as EXW_Wallet.CryptoTypes explicitly. (6) Add Section 5.2 ETL pipeline diagram. (7) Add row count and date range to Section 1. (8) Add inline key=value for PaymentAllowed. (9) Include upstream bundle with Dim_Country and Dim_State_and_Province wikis in next run.
